name: nextjs-supabase-kit
description: Personal web-dev workflow for Next.js (App Router) + Supabase + Cloudflare Turnstile + Vercel. Bundles scaffolding skills, a survey-first CMS/admin retrofit skill, a provider-agnostic payment-integration skill (Stripe, Paddle, Lemon Squeezy, Polar, Whop), code-review skills, and MCP integrations for GitHub, Supabase, Vercel, and Chrome DevTools.
